Operation 'cancelOrder' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is minimal and lacks critical information for AI agents. It doesn't specify what the operation returns, the side effects (customer notification, inventory impact, delivery assignment changes), or the requirement for a cancellation reason. Enhanced description provides complete context for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Cancel a previously confirmed order with a reason.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels a previously confirmed order. Requires a cancellation reason to be provided. Returns the updated order object with status set to 'cancelled'. This operation triggers notification to the customer and may affect restaurant inventory and delivery assignments.
data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and lacks critical information for AI agents. It doesn't specify what the operation returns, the side effects (customer notification, inventory impact, delivery assignment changes), or the requirement for a cancellation reason. Enhanced description provides complete context for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'updateOrderPrepTime' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks information about what is returned and the side effects of updating prep time (customer and driver notifications). Enhanced description clarifies the return value and operational consequences for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Update the estimated preparation time for an active order.
data.description_suggestion: Updates the estimated preparation time for an active order. Accepts a new preparation time duration. Returns the updated order object with the new estimated completion time. This operation notifies the customer and delivery driver of the updated timeline.
data.reasoning: Description lacks information about what is returned and the side effects of updating prep time (customer and driver notifications). Enhanced description clarifies the return value and operational consequences for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getDelivery' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary 'Get delivery info' is too informal and vague. Description lacks specificity about what information is included in the response. Enhanced summary uses more formal terminology consistent with API documentation standards, and description clarifies the scope of returned data for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific delivery.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive information about a specific delivery including driver details, current location, estimated arrival time, delivery address, and status. Returns a Delivery object containing all delivery tracking and logistics data.
data.reasoning: Summary 'Get delivery info' is too informal and vague. Description lacks specificity about what information is included in the response. Enhanced summary uses more formal terminology consistent with API documentation standards, and description clarifies the scope of returned data for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'updateDeliveryStatus' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description provides examples but lacks information about what data is accepted, what is returned, and the side effects of status updates. Enhanced description clarifies input requirements, return value, and operational consequences (customer notifications, order status updates) for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Update the status of a delivery (e.g., picked up, en route, delivered).
data.description_suggestion: Updates the status of a delivery to reflect current progress (e.g., picked up, en route, delivered). Accepts a new delivery status and optional location/timestamp data. Returns the updated Delivery object. This operation triggers customer notifications and may update order fulfillment status.
data.reasoning: Description provides examples but lacks information about what data is accepted, what is returned, and the side effects of status updates. Enhanced description clarifies input requirements, return value, and operational consequences (customer notifications, order status updates) for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getOrderReports' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Description mentions date range but doesn't specify the parameter names or what metrics are included in the returned report. Enhanced description clarifies required parameters and the specific data included in the response for better AI agent understanding of available report metrics.

data.current_description: Retrieve order report data for a restaurant over a specified date range.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aggregated order report data for a restaurant over a specified date range. Requires restaurantId and date range parameters (start_date, end_date). Returns a report object containing order metrics including total orders, revenue, order status breakdown, and item-level sales data.
data.reasoning: Description mentions date range but doesn't specify the parameter names or what metrics are included in the returned report. Enhanced description clarifies required parameters and the specific data included in the response for better AI agent understanding of available report metrics.

Description is generic and doesn't specify what financial metrics are included in the report or the parameter names. Enhanced description clarifies required parameters and the specific financial data included in the response (revenue, fees, commissions, payouts) for better AI agent understanding of available financial information.

data.current_description: Retrieve financial report data for a restaurant over a specified date range.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves financial report data for a restaurant over a specified date range. Requires restaurantId and date range parameters (start_date, end_date). Returns a report object containing financial metrics including gross revenue, fees, commissions, payouts, and transaction details.
data.reasoning: Description is generic and doesn't specify what financial metrics are included in the report or the parameter names.
